{{Quote|My second…my second was Eremin Tarn.|Maks Leem, to Yoda|<ref name="Y:DR" />}}
'''Eremin Tarn''' was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] individual who lived during the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] [[Great Peace of the Republic|reign]]. At the age of thirteen, Tarn was taken as a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Maks Leem]] and [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] to wield [[the Force]], serving in the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] as a protector for the Republic. A headstrong yet principled student, Tarn defied the authority of many people, including his Master.<ref name="Y:DR" />

When the inter-[[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|began]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> Tarn was one of many Jedi to become disillusioned with the Jedi Order. He left the Order and became a follower of Jedi Master [[Sian Jeisel]], who believed that the Jedi should have been fighting against the seemingly corrupt Republic rather than defending it against the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].<ref name="Y:DR" /> In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],<ref name="Date">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'' to [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]].</ref> Leem conversed with Jedi [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] about her former Padawans, expressing her sadness that Tarn had followed Jeisel by departing the Order.<ref name="Y:DR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Eremin Tarn was mentioned in ''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'', a novel written by [[Sean Stewart]] and published in [[2004]].<ref name="Y:DR" />
